justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's preferred day and time in each turn, even when the user expressed flexibility.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternative days when the requested slot was unavailable, and eventually broadened the search to find a suitable time.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made several redundant API calls by checking specific 3 PM slots repeatedly before offering to check the entire day.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation became somewhat frustrating due to the repeated unavailability of the preferred time, leading to multiple apologies from the agent.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent consistently maintained context and offered relevant alternatives, even when the user's initial requests were unavailable.
